sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, content VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'A%BC'), (3, 'DuckDB is Awesome');
UPDATE test_strings SET content = 'Updated Value' WHERE ilike_escape(content, 'updated%', '%');
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE ilike_escape(content, 'Duck%', '%');
